<section id="sec-cover" class="section active">
  <div class="cover-wrap">
    <div class="cover-image-placeholder">
      <div class="cover-img-label">Book Cover Art</div>
      <div class="cover-icon">🏭</div>
      <div class="cover-img-hint">[ Replace with final cover illustration — suggested: an industrial control room overlaid with data visualizations ]</div>
    </div>
    <div class="cover-body">
      <div class="cover-edition">First Edition · 2025</div>
      <div class="cover-main-title">Data Science in Heavy Industry</div>
      <div class="cover-subtitle">From Raw Data to Operational Intelligence</div>
      <div class="cover-divider"></div>
      <div class="cover-author">Manoj Kumar</div>
      <div class="cover-publisher">Academic & Technical Press</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
